description: entity_id must not be null.
recommendation: Ensure every entity has a stable master identifier.

description: entity_id must be unique.
recommendation: Investigate duplicate entity IDs and apply survivorship rules.
failed_examples: [{'entity_id': 'ENT000024', 'legal_name': 'Lagos Continental Services', 'country_code': 'NL', 'source_system': 'Internal Master'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000030', 'legal_name': 'Redwood Industries', 'country_code': 'DE', 'source_system': 'Issuer Feed'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000066', 'legal_name': 'Oakwell Technologies', 'country_code': 'US', 'source_system': 'Issuer Feed'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000080', 'legal_name': 'Albion Investments', 'country_code': 'BR', 'source_system': 'KYC Platform'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000085', 'legal_name': 'Helios Limited', 'country_code': 'DE', 'source_system': 'Issuer Feed'}]

description: legal_name must not be null.
recommendation: Request missing legal names from the source owner or provider.
failed_examples: [{'entity_id': 'ENT000079', 'legal_name': nan, 'source_system': 'Manual Upload'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000099', 'legal_name': nan, 'source_system': 'KYC Platform'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000103', 'legal_name': nan, 'source_system': 'ProviderA'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000156', 'legal_name': nan, 'source_system': 'Issuer Feed'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000168', 'legal_name': nan, 'source_system': 'KYC Platform'}]

description: country_code must be in the approved country list.
recommendation: Standardise invalid country codes.
failed_examples: [{'entity_id': 'ENT000013', 'legal_name': 'Frontier Industries', 'country_code': nan, 'source_system': 'KYC Platform'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000042', 'legal_name': 'BluePeak Corporation', 'country_code': nan, 'source_system': 'Manual Upload'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000199', 'legal_name': 'Korefield PLC', 'country_code': nan, 'source_system': 'ProviderA'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000257', 'legal_name': 'Silvergate Corporation', 'country_code': 'XX', 'source_system': 'Issuer Feed'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000340', 'legal_name': 'Meridian Finance', 'country_code': nan, 'source_system': 'Issuer Feed'}]

description: entity_type must be in the approved taxonomy.
recommendation: Map unsupported entity types to the approved taxonomy.
failed_examples: [{'entity_id': 'ENT000040', 'legal_name': 'Oakwell Industries', 'entity_type': 'Company?'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000041', 'legal_name': 'Granite Energy', 'entity_type': 'UnknownType'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000163', 'legal_name': 'Union Holdings', 'entity_type': 'Company?'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000203', 'legal_name': 'Albion Technologies', 'entity_type': nan}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000333', 'legal_name': 'Oakwell Industries', 'entity_type': nan}]

description: status must be in the approved status list.
recommendation: Standardise status values across source systems.
failed_examples: [{'entity_id': 'ENT000310', 'legal_name': nan, 'status': 'Closed?'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000335', 'legal_name': 'Westbridge Ltd', 'status': 'Closed?'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000521', 'legal_name': 'Greenfield Corporation', 'status': nan}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000540', 'legal_name': 'Crestline Corporation', 'status': 'Running'}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000802', 'legal_name': 'PrimeEdge Group', 'status': nan}]

description: incorporation_date cannot be in the future.
recommendation: Review future incorporation dates with the source owner.

description: active entity records should be verified within the last 365 days.
recommendation: Prioritise stale active entities for review.

description: private companies should have a registration number where available.
recommendation: Improve enrichment for private company registration numbers.
failed_examples: [{'entity_id': 'ENT000004', 'legal_name': 'Atlas Industries', 'entity_type': 'Private Company', 'registration_number': nan}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000029', 'legal_name': 'Meridian PLC', 'entity_type': 'Private Company', 'registration_number': nan}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000062', 'legal_name': 'Horizon Energy', 'entity_type': 'Private Company', 'registration_number': nan}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000074', 'legal_name': 'Northbridge Holdings', 'entity_type': 'Private Company', 'registration_number': nan}, {'entity_id': 'ENT000121', 'legal_name': 'Riverstone Partners', 'entity_type': 'Private Company', 'registration_number': nan}]

description: issuer_id must not be null.
recommendation: Ensure every issuer record has a stable issuer identifier.

description: issuer_id must be unique.
recommendation: Investigate duplicate issuer records.

description: issuer entity_id must exist in the entity master table.
recommendation: Fix orphan issuer records by matching them to valid entity IDs.
failed_examples: [{'issuer_id': 'ISS000045', 'entity_id': 'ENT_ORPHAN_25', 'issuer_name': 'Riverstone Services', 'source_system': 'Manual Upload'}, {'issuer_id': 'ISS000050', 'entity_id': 'ENT_ORPHAN_65', 'issuer_name': 'Frontier Group', 'source_system': 'ProviderA'}, {'issuer_id': 'ISS000163', 'entity_id': 'ENT_ORPHAN_59', 'issuer_name': 'Meridian Investments', 'source_system': 'Issuer Feed'}, {'issuer_id': 'ISS000177', 'entity_id': 'ENT_ORPHAN_12', 'issuer_name': 'Crestline Industries', 'source_system': 'Issuer Feed'}, {'issuer_id': 'ISS000192', 'entity_id': 'ENT_ORPHAN_41', 'issuer_name': 'Atlas Energy', 'source_system': 'ProviderB'}]

description: instrument_type must be in the approved instrument list.
recommendation: Map invalid instrument types to the approved taxonomy.

description: listed issuers should have an exchange code.
recommendation: Request missing exchange codes for listed issuers.

description: child_entity_id must exist in entity master.
recommendation: Resolve orphan child entities before publishing hierarchy data.

description: parent_entity_id must exist in entity master.
recommendation: Resolve orphan parent entities before publishing hierarchy data.

description: child_entity_id cannot equal parent_entity_id.
recommendation: Remove self-referencing hierarchy relationships.

description: ownership_percentage must be between 0 and 100.
recommendation: Review ownership percentages outside the valid range.

description: hierarchy should not contain circular parent-child relationships.
recommendation: Investigate circular relationships and apply hierarchy survivorship rules.

description: KYC entity_id must exist in entity master.
recommendation: Resolve orphan KYC records or create missing master entity records.

description: risk_rating must be Low, Medium, High, or Critical.
recommendation: Map invalid risk ratings to the approved risk taxonomy.

description: High and Critical risk counterparties should have been reviewed within 365 days.
recommendation: Prioritise stale high-risk counterparties for review.

description: next_review_due_date should not be overdue.
recommendation: Trigger remediation workflow for overdue KYC reviews.

description: provider_record_id must be unique.
recommendation: Investigate duplicated records from third-party provider feeds.

description: provider legal_name must not be null.
recommendation: Reject provider records without legal names or return them for enrichment.

description: confidence_score must be between 0 and 1.
recommendation: Standardise provider confidence scores and reject invalid values.

description: provider registration_number should match an internal master record where available.
recommendation: Run entity matching and investigate unmatched provider records.
